src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Replace direct static utility calls for EntityManager creation with a dependency-injected service.
Introduce EntityManagerService as a constructor dependency to decouple DAO from static utilities.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Remove redundant null checks when closing EntityManager, relying on the service to provide valid instances.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Changed `if (em != null) { em.close(); }` to `em.close();` in finally blocks

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Remove redundant null checks for EntityTransaction since it is now obtained directly from the EntityManager.
Add comprehensive JavaDoc comments to the class and its public methods.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Added `/** ... */` blocks describing CRUD operations and parameters

Explicitly defined ID generation strategy as IDENTITY to ensure correct behavior with the database.
Renamed the transient field from transientNote to note for clarity.
Added a convenience constructor to initialize entity fields directly.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Add java.util.Optional import to support modern return types.
Add specific Jakarta Persistence imports for transactions and query types.

Replace static utility call for EntityManager creation with service-based creation.

Add new method to delete employees by ID range using bulk delete query.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replaced javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE 10 / Tomcat 10.1.
Replaced javax.annotation-api and javax.servlet jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api for Jakarta EE compatibility.
Replaced legacy jstl implementation with GlassFish Jakarta JSTL implementation.
Upgraded PostgreSQL JDBC driver from 42.4.1 to 42.7.1.
Upgraded Maven WAR plugin from 3.3.2 to 3.4.0.
Removed JUnit, AssertJ, Tomcat JNDI, and Tomcat DBCP test dependencies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed junit-jupiter-engine, assertj-core, tomcat8jndi, and tomcat-dbcp dependencies.
